infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Zeal reads your steps, calories, and heart rate to enhance your training readiness and insights.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Zeal writes your completed workouts to Apple Health to keep your health records in sync.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Zeal uses your location to map your runs, measure distance, and compute pace.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Zeal continues tracking your run in the background so your route and distance keep updating when the screen is locked or you switch apps.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Zeal lets you pick photos from your library to set your profile picture, log proof-of-workout shots for the 75 Hard challenge, and analyze meal photos for nutrition tracking — for example, selecting a photo of your plate so Zeal can estimate calories and macros.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Zeal uses the camera to capture proof-of-workout shots for the 75 Hard challenge and meal photos for nutrition tracking — for example, snapping a photo of your dinner so Zeal can estimate calories and macros.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Zeal uses your location to map your runs, measure distance, and compute pace — including when the app is in the background so your route keeps updating while the screen is locked.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Zeal uses your location to map your runs, measure distance, and compute pace.
